# Upstream source

- Upstream repo: https://github.com/baslefeber/shopify-skills
- Upstream path: `baslefeber_shopify-skills/skills/shopify-performance-audit`
- License: MIT, copied from upstream `LICENSE` into this directory as `LICENSE.upstream`
- Stars at selection time: 0
- Last updated at selection time: 2026-06-24T11:54:16Z
- Selection reason: Adds Core Web Vitals/performance audit coverage for Shopify themes.
- Local modifications: none; copied as an optional external Skill.

## Usage note

This is an external vendor Skill included for convenience and attribution. It may use upstream terminology or assumptions. Before wiring it into a live Shopify operator, review its safety behavior against the repository policy at `references/owner-approval-policy.md`.

## Selection rule

When multiple external Skills overlapped, this repo selected the candidate with the strongest combination of star count, recent update activity, Shopify owner/operator fit, and clear upstream license file. Repositories without an upstream `LICENSE` file were kept as references only and were not copied.
